title: schoenus andinus
intro: Schoenus andinus is a species of sedge, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is native to South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Schoenus andinus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
